title: Prototype™

notes: Runs perfectly fine, but there's absolutely no audio. Nothing in the menus, cut-scenes, in-game, etc.
title: Prototype™

cpu: AMD Ryzen 7 2700U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes:
To fix the audio run "protontricks 10150 winecfg" and  set the xaudio2_3.dll to buildin, now you should have audio. D9VK only works in the main menu but the game crashes as soon as you try to load a safe file.
Not a wine specific tweak but important one is to disable all CPU cores except 4 or less to prevent crashes between cutscenes.  It will still happen but way less frequent so be warned. If you want widescreen support go to: https://www.wsgf.org/dr/prototype download the zip and override prototypeenginef.dll with the one you need. It will automatically change the resolution to the one of your screen. After that the game options will only show "Label" instead of the resolution list, this is normal.
title: Prototype™

cpu: AMD Ryzen 7 2700U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes:
To fix the audio run "protontricks 10150 winecfg" and set the xaudio2_3.dll to buildin.
Runs really well with D9VK, somehow this fixed all crashes and I don't have to run it with only four cores anymore.
title: Prototype™

notes:
Add WINEDLLOVERRIDES="xaudio2_3=b" PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% to the launch options to fix the audio and also get good performance. If the game still crashes disable SMT or some cores (8 cores without SMT worked fine get like 450-500fps). The SMT issue is a game bug and also affects Windows.
Would recommend this patch as well: https://www.wsgf.org/dr/prototype.
title: Prototype™
